events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll create the required JSON file directly. I’m checking the OSHA reference point first because the finding turns on whether lockout/tagout identification and isolation steps are complete before work continues.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The condition is a stop-work failure: the isolation control is not complete or clearly attributable. I’m writing the JSON with the required corrective sequence before any servicing or rigging work resumes.
